hypothesis: Matched architecture probe under the fixed mainline recipe. Final reconstruction formula is x_hat = U(Vx) + Σ_m pi_m c_m + Σ_i alpha_i b_i. This is LUTurbo 扩展兼容 because the low-rank trunk term U(Vx) can be exported as a static trunk vector library, the soft codebook term Σ_m pi_m c_m uses a static codebook library, and the sparse residual term Σ_i alpha_i b_i uses a static residual dictionary, so LUTurbo/Lottable inference remains static lookup plus weighted summation plus optional residual compensation. Holding K=128, EXPANSION_FACTOR=2, OPTIMIZER=signum, and LR=3.0e-3 fixed, this probe isolates whether the second residual refinement stage in lowrank_two_stage_soft_codebook_residual is actually buying enough FVU to justify its extra encoder selection cost and runtime overhead in the feasible low-EF regime.
next_hypotheses: Return to the lowrank_two_stage_soft_codebook_residual mainline next round as required by policy.
If lowrank_soft_codebook_residual is close in FVU while materially faster or cheaper at the same K/EF recipe, treat the second residual stage as weak value in the current LUTurbo-compatible regime.
notes_to_memory: This is a parent-family matched probe, not a new incompatible line: same trunk+codebook decomposition, only removes the second sparse refinement branch.

Selection-cost rationale: this family is comfortably feasible at EF=2 and materially cheaper than the two-stage parent, making it the cleanest architecture-only test of whether stage-2 refinement is worth keeping.
Judge the result using both FVU and runtime counters (tokens_per_sec, total wall time, final_total_tokens), because recent rounds show meaningful throughput drift.
self_review: This obeys the one-variable rule and avoids the previously policy-rejected asymmetric candidate. It is the most informative matched probe because it differs from the current mainline by exactly one structural element: the existence of the second residual stage. More distant probes like factorized_topk or lowrank_residual answer broader questions but are less diagnostic for the current mainline family.
summary: Probe ARCHITECTURE=lowrank_soft_codebook_residual with the mainline K=128, EF=2, signum, LR=3.0e-3 recipe unchanged. This directly tests whether the extra second-stage residual refinement in the current mainline is worth its added online selection cost and runtime in the LUTurbo-compatible low-EF setting.
